name: Almond Lemon Tart
recipeIngredient: 3 Egg Beaters® 99% Egg Substitute or equivalent
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, mix the almonds, almond paste, and sugar until combined.
2. Add the butter to the food processor through the feed tube while the processor is running. Process until a dough forms.
3. Press the dough into a flan pan with a removable bottom that has been sprayed with cooking spray.
4. Use a chunk of dough to create a rope and press it into the sides of the flan pan flute.
5. Flatten a chunk of dough and press it into the bottom of the crust (this can be done ahead of time).
6. Bake at 350°F until lightly browned.
1. In another food processor, blend the lemon zest and juice with the almond mixture.
2. Add the cream to the food processor through the feed tube and process until smooth.
3. Pour the filling into the crust.
4. Jiggle the pan to remove any bubbles.
5. Bake at 350°F for 20-25 minutes or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean.
